intro: Music has been a constant companion throughout my life (and has caused me to throw many a tantrum in childhood). These days, we have a friendlier relationship - here are snippets of some of my recent projects!

gallery.caption: Gradients 2026
gallery.note: Played keyboard in the band for the University of Michigan Musical Theatre department's biannual cabaret celebrating POC artists.

gallery.caption: The Hunchback of Notre Dame
gallery.note: Assistant Music Director and Keys 1 in MUSKET's Winter 2025 production.

gallery.caption: Jesus Christ Superstar
gallery.note: Assistant Music Director and Keys 1 in MUSKET's Fall 2024 production - shoutout to Jason, the music director!

gallery.caption: Catch Me If You Can
gallery.note: Assistant Music Director and Keys 1 in MUSKET's Winter 2024 production - shoutout to Caitlyn, the music director!

gallery.caption: Heathers
gallery.note: Rehearsal Pianist and Keys 1 in MUSKET's Fall 2023 production - shoutout to Teja and Jerry, my friends in the photo :)

gallery.caption: stick straight posture since day 1
gallery.note: Classically trained pianist, competed and won at regional and national competitions. Performed at Carnegie Hall for the American Protege's Winners Concert in 2021.
